description: Curated realistic utterance pool for semantic rerank pressure testing.

cases.query: what is stressing him most with his partner right now

utterances.text: My partner says she is carrying me financially and it hit hard.
I avoid opening the rent app because my chest tightens.
I promised to wake by 7 and walk daily.
Current focus: shipping onboarding for the release.
They argued late about money and feeling unsupported.
I made lentil soup and watched a movie.

cases.query: sleep and stress pattern this week

utterances.text: Duermo fatal, me despierto a las 3 y luego no regreso.
Cuando no duermo me pongo irritable con todos.
Client demo moved to Friday.
Routine slipped all week: late phone scrolling, short sleep, high stress.
I want to learn Rust in the evenings.
Work context: preparing investor update deck.

cases.query: what work pressure is he feeling

utterances.text: Im Job fuehle ich mich gehetzt, alles ist dringend.
Der Kunde droht abzuspringen wenn wir den Termin reissen.
My sister visited and we cooked.
Deadline fear plus uncertainty about team capacity.
I should drink more water.
Pattern: Juggles multiple active commitments and threads.
Everything feels loud and bright and I cannot settle.
My body is tired but my mind keeps sprinting.
Need to buy detergent and eggs.
Overwhelm and restlessness dominated the evening.
Current focus: finalize release notes.
I read 20 pages of a novel.

cases.query: what is blocking consistency with workouts

utterances.text: I skip workouts when meetings spill into the night.
My knee flared up again after the run.
I sent the investor memo.
north star health goal: move daily and sleep on time.
Intent to train is high but work spillover and pain interrupt routine.
My partner likes the new couch color.
Ana daiman baskut waqt el khena2 w ba3den andam.
She says I disappear into work when things get hard.
Need to renew hosting and domain.
Repeated rupture-repair cycle: withdrawal during conflict, remorse later.
Work context: pushing API reliability fixes.
I enjoyed mint tea after dinner.

cases.query: is this a commitment or just reflection

utterances.text: I will send the apology message tonight.
I keep rehearsing it and freezing.
The weather is nicer now.
Clear commitment stated, but fear-based delay pattern remains.
Pattern: avoids high-stakes conversations when dysregulated.
I fixed a small CSS issue.
Je stresse pour le loyer, le compte baisse trop vite.
I keep delaying the budget sheet because it makes me panic.
Morning walk felt good today.
Current focus: close onboarding bug backlog.
Financial pressure is tightly linked to avoidance and shame.
I watched a football match.
I want to practice SQL joins every morning for 20 minutes.
Production incidents keep eating my evenings.
I enrolled in a short systems design course.
Work context: stabilizing release pipeline.
Learning goals exist but are fragile under work load.
I cleaned the kitchen counter.

cases.query: which home factors affect his health habits

utterances.text: When the apartment is cluttered I stop cooking and order junk.
Noisy neighbors at night wreck my sleep.
Client asked for another analytics chart.
north star work goal: ship reliable weekly cadence.
Home environment cues are tightly coupled with food and sleep behavior.
I replied to two emails.
